name: Fudge Brownie Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Bake pastry shell for 10 minutes; remove from oven.
3. Reduce oven temperature to 325°F.
4. In a saucepan, melt chocolate chips with margarine over low heat.
5. In a large mixing bowl, beat the chocolate mixture with remaining ingredients except nuts until smooth.
6. Add chopped nuts.
7. Pour into prepared pastry shell.
8. Bake for 35 to 45 minutes or until center is set.
9. Cool. Serve warm or at room temperature with ice cream if desired.
